productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Olive Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 21cmWidth: 27cmDepth: 12cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper, a zippered seperator and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short twilltape handles for carrying ease and styleZipper pocket on the front and at the back for additional space                                                                          Metallic embellishment with brand name on the front                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Metallic chain design on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
